sections.title: Product definition
sections.text: Canned Humus with tehena is the product: (a) prepared from pure, dry, washed, boiled and mashed chickpeas with tehena added with or without salt; (b) packed in a well-sealed container; (c) processed by heat in an appropriate manner, before or after being hermetically sealed in a container, so as to prevent spoilage.
sections.retrieval_text:
DESCRIPTION > Product definition
number=2.1
level=2
Canned Humus with tehena is the product: (a) prepared from pure, dry, washed, boiled and mashed chickpeas with tehena added with or without salt; (b) packed in a well-sealed container; (c) processed by heat in an appropriate manner, before or after being hermetically sealed in a container, so as to prevent spoilage.

page_spans.text: Canned Humus with tehena is the product: (a) prepared from pure, dry, washed, boiled and mashed chickpeas with tehena added with or without salt; (b) packed in a well-sealed container; (c) processed by heat in an appropriate manner, before or after being hermetically sealed in a container, so as to prevent spoilage.

sections.title: Minimum Fill
sections.text: The container shall be well filled with the product and the product shall occupy not less than 90% of the water capacity of the container. The water capacity of the container is the volume of distilled water at 20oC which the sealed container will hold when completely filled.

sentences.original: Canned Humus with tehena is the product: (a) prepared from pure, dry, washed, boiled and mashed chickpeas with tehena added with or without salt; (b) packed in a well-sealed container; (c) processed by heat in an appropriate manner, before or after being hermetically sealed in a container, so as to prevent spoilage.

prefilter.reason: Describes product preparation and processing, relevant to regulation.

classification.sentence: Canned Humus with tehena is the product: (a) prepared from pure, dry, washed, boiled and mashed chickpeas with tehena added with or without salt; (b) packed in a well-sealed container; (c) processed by heat in an appropriate manner, before or after being hermetically sealed in a container, so as to prevent spoilage.
classification.pattern: Product is defined by enumerated preparation steps and characteristics.

features: prepared from pure, dry, washed, boiled and mashed chickpeas with tehena added with or without salt
processed by heat in an appropriate manner before or after being hermetically sealed to prevent spoilage

pages.title: REGIONAL STANDARD FOR CANNED HUMUS WITH TEHENA (Near East)
pages.summary: Página com título principal em caixa alta sem numeração, usado como nível 1. Document title capturado. Um nó estrutural principal mapeado com texto explicativo associado. Cabeçalho identificado como CXS 257R-2007. Nenhuma subseção evidente na página.

Página com cabeçalho identificado como 'CXS 257R-2007  2'. Foram mapeadas quatro seções principais numeradas no nível 1 (SCOPE, DESCRIPTION, ESSENTIAL COMPOSITION AND QUALITY FACTORS, FOOD ADDITIVES) com suas respectivas subseções e itens hierárquicos. O texto foi associado apropriadamente a cada nó, respeitando a hierarquia e a continuidade. A seção 4 FOOD ADDITIVES indica continuação na próxima página.

Página 3 com as seções 5 a 10 do documento. Estrutura hierárquica seguida rigorosamente com níveis 1, 2 e 3 conforme índice numérico. Texto alocado conforme título/subtítulo. A seção 9 LABELLING demonstra continuidade para próxima página. Cabeçalho identificado. Ausência de título principal do documento nesta página.
